product_information.product_name: Dr. Organic Moroccan Argan Oil Shampoo 265 ML
product_information.description:
Het Product
This Moroccan Argan Oil Shampoo is a revitalising daily cleanser designed to nourish and restore dry, damaged hair. It helps strengthen, soften, and enhance shine for a naturally healthy-looking finish. Infused with organic moroccan argan oil, rich in essential fatty acids and antioxidants, it provides deep hydration while protecting hair from dryness and environmental stressors. The gentle formula cleanses without stripping, leaving hair feeling smooth, manageable, and revitalised.
Ingredienten
Aqua, Aloe barbadensis leaf juice powder†, Ammonium lauryl sulfate, Glycerin, Caprylyl/capryl glucoside, Cocamidopropyl betaine, Sea salt (Maris sal), *ARGANIA SPINOSA KERNEL OIL (KEY ACTIVE: Moroccan Argan Oil)†, Argania spinosa (Argan) kernel extract†, Hibiscus sabdariffa (Roselle) flower extract†, Kigelia africana fruit extract†, Adansonia digitata (Baobab) fruit extract†, Citrus limon (Lemon) peel oil†, Mentha arvensis (Wild mint) leaf oil†, Cinnamomum zeylanicum (Cinnamon) leaf oil, Eugenia caryophyllus (Clove) leaf oil, Pelargonium graveolens (Rose geranium) oil, Pogostemon cablin (Patchouli) oil, Citrus nobilis (Mandarin orange) peel oil, Mentha viridis (Spearmint) leaf oil, Guar hydroxypropyltrimonium chloride, Citric acid, Sodium phytate, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate, Benzyl alcohol, Dehydroacetic acid, Limonene, Eugenia caryophyllus oil, Pelargonium graveolens flower oil, Citrus limon peel oil, Cinnamomum zeylanicum bark oil, Pogostemon cablin oil, Citronellol. † certified organic 10% organic, 98% natural origin
